name: Pumpkin Cookies (Fj P.453)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together.
2. Add eggs and beat thoroughly.
3. Mix in vanilla and pumpkin.
4. Combine the dry ingredients and add to creamed mixture.
5. Stir in raisins or pecans if used.
6. Bake 2 inches apart on a paper lined (baking paper) sheet tray or lightly greased cookie sheet. Use a well-rounded tablespoon and then flatten each cookie slightly with the bottom of a glass that has been dipped in sugar to keep from sticking.
7. Conventional Oven: 350°F until lightly browned.
8. Convection Oven: 325°F until lightly browned.
These baking times are just a guide. You should do what works best for your oven. Enjoy!
These cookies should be soft and chewy.
